positive: Minimalist retro botanical illustration of a whimsical jungle scene. Foreground features stylized Monstera leaves, palm fronds, and deep purple flowering vines arranged in a symmetrical, central cluster. The composition should utilize a limited color palette of teal, emerald green, muted mustard yellow, and deep violet. Clean, crisp lines are mandatory. Inspired by mid-century scientific etchings and stained glass art, providing strong silhouettes and high contrast. Perfect for screen printing on apparel. Studio lighting, flat graphic design style, vector art.
